name: TalentLMS
description: TalentLMS learning management system for employee training and compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to TalentLMS as admin
2. Go to Account & Settings → Basic Settings
3. Copy the API Key shown on the page
4. Enter your subdomain and paste the API key below

credentialFields.label: Company Subdomain
credentialFields.helpText: Your TalentLMS subdomain (e.g. if your URL is acme.talentlms.com, enter: acme)

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Get your API key from TalentLMS → Account & Settings → Basic Settings → API Key

checks.name: Employee Verification
checks.description: Verifies employee training and course completion status in TalentLMS
